name: Thesis Drift
description_en: Detect when an investment thesis drifts: separate facts from wording changes and decide whether the original thesis still holds.
description_zh: 检测投资论文漂移：区分事实变化与措辞变化，判断原始论文是否仍然成立。
long_en: One skill from the AI Berkshire value-investing collection. It compares current evidence against the original investment thesis, flags factual changes versus rhetorical shifts, and recommends reopen, hold, or exit.
long_zh: AI Berkshire 价值投资技能集之一。将当前证据与原始投资论文对比，标记事实变化与修辞变化，并建议重新研究、持有或退出。
sec_note_en: Reads local thesis files and performs web searches for new evidence. No external accounts required.
sec_note_zh: 会读取本地论文文件，并执行网络搜索获取新证据。无需外部账号。
